name: username
description: Open, horizontal, re-usable Claude Code skills & plugins by Username (Studio A.I.).

plugins.name: claude-remote-spawn
plugins.description: Spawn or resume a persistent, remote-controllable Claude Code session you can drive from your phone or desktop. PTY-backed, survives detached. Terminal-agnostic, cross-platform.

plugins.name: aws-remote-auth
plugins.description: On-demand AWS SSO re-authentication via device code (autofill link), with a PreToolUse hook that auto-detects expired sessions on aws commands. Generic across profiles and SSO portals.

plugins.name: delivery-metrics
plugins.description: Generate a developer productivity & quality report (interactive HTML dashboard) from git history — single repo or submodule workspace. Repo-agnostic and configurable.

plugins.name: claude-code-diagnosis
plugins.description: Diagnose your own Claude Code usage and benchmark it against Anthropic's published per-developer figures — an interactive HTML dashboard of cost, tokens, model mix, tool use, cache efficiency, per-project breakdown and a percentile placement. Cost reconciles within ~1% of ccusage. No network, no account access.

plugins.name: find-session
plugins.description: Find and resume a past Claude Code session from a search term — decomposes the query, cross-matches local transcripts, and returns the best session ID with a ready claude --resume command. Project-aware, macOS and Linux.

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: Full Trivy security audit — dependency CVEs across every ecosystem, secrets, and IaC misconfigurations — as a prioritised Markdown report and a dark HTML dashboard. Report-only, language-agnostic, Trivy the only dependency.
